Genuine leather
▫️Model 855371 Small

Gucci New Fall/Winter Collection The brand's iconic GG Marmont series artfully blends classic double-G elements and fluted chain straps to create a soft yet structured silhouette. This piece is crafted from soft, lightweight quilted V-shaped calfskin.
